error_message: GET /api/recipes returns HTTP 200 for unauthenticated (anon) requests
root_cause: The recipe list endpoint lacks requireAuth middleware — the recipe library is publicly readable without a JWT token
fix: Add requireAuth middleware to GET /api/recipes route; verify all recipe sub-routes are guarded
sprint_4_action: Add requireAuth to recipe list route; regression test ADV-003 must pass without knownPublic flag

error_message: GET /api/v1/tiers/current and GET /api/v1/tiers/usage hang/timeout for unauthenticated requests (no response within 60s)
root_cause: Tier endpoints have no auth guard — anon request triggers DB query with null userId, causing the query to hang or never respond
fix: Add requireAuth middleware as FIRST middleware on all tier routes; ensure null userId short-circuits to 401 immediately
sprint_4_action: Add requireAuth to all /api/v1/tiers/* routes; regression test must not timeout

error_message: Hal dual-claim race: no atomic claim endpoint — two Hal instances can claim the same bug simultaneously
root_cause: No row-level lock or atomic claim guard. PATCH /api/bugs/:id/assign does a SELECT then UPDATE without a transaction + FOR UPDATE lock
fix: Implement atomic claim: BEGIN; SELECT ... FOR UPDATE; check status=open; UPDATE status=in_progress; COMMIT. Return 409 if already claimed.
sprint_4_action: Add FOR UPDATE row lock to claim endpoint; add unique index on (status=in_progress, assignedToHal=true) per bug

error_message: No unique constraint on (mealPlanId, customerId) in mealPlanAssignments — double-assign creates duplicate rows
root_cause: Schema has no uniqueness constraint on the assignment join table; calling POST /api/trainer/meal-plans/:id/assign twice creates two rows
fix: Add UNIQUE constraint: ALTER TABLE meal_plan_assignments ADD CONSTRAINT uq_plan_customer UNIQUE (meal_plan_id, customer_id)
sprint_4_action: Add Drizzle unique() constraint to mealPlanAssignments; create migration 0023
